tools.name: checkCode.postCheckCode
tools.description:
Checks the user's emailed code is valid. 
If this returns success=true, you can safely assume the user you are interacting with is the owner of that email address.

tools.name: sendCode.postSendCode
tools.description: This request send's a code to the given email address, which should be returned to check it is correct.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
